trigger: User + Claude caught sign-off on unbuilt WO layers
methodology: grep + import test + file existence + test execution + receipt search

WO-K.name: Trading Research Runtime
WO-K.description_claimed: Trading executors, thesis evaluation, conviction scoring, signal generation, backtests

expected_components.conviction_engine: Tier-aware conviction scoring with counter-thesis testing
expected_components.risk_metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown, alpha/beta, etc.

fgip/backtest/position_sizing.py.note: DEFINED but position_sizing functions not wired into backtest engine main loop

tests_found.tests/test_agents.py: 43 tests (agents, staging, imports) — 42 pass, 1 fail (provenance lock)

receipts_found.receipts/paper_trade/SUMMARY.json: 8 thesis backtests with SHA256 hashes, reproducibility_verified=true

missing: position_sizing functions defined but not integrated into backtest loop
trailing_stop_pct defined in BacktestConfig but implementation unclear
No dedicated SignalGenerator class (signals embedded in agent outputs)
No dedicated TradingExecutor for live/paper execution flow
WO-K.verdict: Core runtime EXISTS and RUNS. Conviction→TradePlan→Backtest chain works. Position sizing and stop logic are stubs. 80% implemented.

WO-L.name: Backtest Integrity Enforcement
WO-L.description_claimed: Leakage checking, data validation, result auditing, benchmark comparison

expected_components.leakage_checker: Detect lookahead bias and data leakage in backtests
expected_components.data_validator: Validate input data quality and completeness
expected_components.result_auditor: Audit backtest results for statistical validity
expected_components.benchmark_comparison: Compare strategy vs benchmark with proper methodology

fgip/pipeline/leak_detector.py.note: This is PIPELINE integrity (proposal quality), NOT backtest integrity
fgip/pipeline/leak_detector.py.status: IMPLEMENTED but wrong scope for WO-L

fgip/backtest/portfolio_backtest.py.lookahead_protection: Yes — date-filtered data access, no future prices
fgip/backtest/portfolio_backtest.py.benchmark_comparison: Yes — SPY benchmark with alpha/beta calculation
fgip/backtest/portfolio_backtest.py.status: PARTIAL — basic integrity built into backtest, not separate auditor

receipts_found.receipts/paper_trade/SUMMARY.json: Has inputs_hash + outputs_hash per backtest (determinism check)
receipts_found.note: Hashes exist but no separate integrity audit receipt

missing: No DataValidator class
No ResultAuditor class
No dedicated backtest integrity test suite
No out-of-sample vs in-sample separation
LeakDetector covers pipeline, not backtest lookahead
No walk-forward validation (walk_forward_calibrate.py exists in tools/ but separate from backtest)
No statistical significance testing (p-values, bootstrap)
WO-L.verdict: Anti-lookahead logic exists INSIDE the backtest engine. LeakDetector covers pipeline integrity. But NO dedicated backtest integrity auditor, no data validator, no result auditor. 40% of WO-L scope.

WO-M.name: Thesis → Signal → Trade Traceability
WO-M.description_claimed: ThesisSnapshot, SignalSnapshot, ConvictionTrace, TradeDecision, BacktestIntegrity, BenchmarkComparison — full trace chain

expected_components.thesis_snapshot: Immutable snapshot of thesis state at decision time
expected_components.signal_snapshot: Immutable snapshot of signals used for conviction
expected_components.trade_decision: Snapshot linking conviction to execution decision
expected_components.end_to_end_trace: thesis → data → signal → conviction → trade → result

fgip/analysis/provenance.py.note: Tracks data origin, not decision traceability

fgip/analysis/provenance_tracker.py.note: Maps edges to originating signals (YouTube, RSS, search). GOOD provenance but not decision trace.

fgip/agents/conviction_engine.py.note: ConvictionReport captures conviction state but is NOT a snapshot (no timestamp, no immutability)

fgip/agents/trade_plan_agent.py.note: TradeMemo links decision to sources but NOT to execution result

fgip/decisions/gate.py.note: Full audit trail per gate check. Good provenance.

fgip/regime/belief_revision.py.note: Belief revision with SUPERSEDES edges. Versioning exists.

receipts_found.note: No full trace chain receipt linking thesis→signal→conviction→trade→result

missing: No ThesisSnapshot class (ConvictionReport is close but not immutable/timestamped)
No SignalSnapshot class (signals are ephemeral objects)
No ConvictionTrace linking thesis → signals → score in a single traceable object
No TradeDecision snapshot linking conviction to execution
No BenchmarkComparison as standalone object
No end-to-end trace chain receipt
Provenance tracks data origin, not decision chain
Gate audit trail exists but not linked to trade outcome
WO-M.verdict: BUILDING BLOCKS exist (provenance, conviction reports, trade memos, gate audit trails, belief revision). But NO unified trace chain connecting them. The pieces are there; the wiring is not. 35% of WO-M scope.

WO-N.name: Market Realism + Dataset Determinism
WO-N.description_claimed: DataSnapshot (dataset hashing), ExecutionModel (slippage/commission/impact presets), RobustnessTest (Monte Carlo perturbation)

expected_components.data_snapshot: Hash/fingerprint input dataset for deterministic replay
expected_components.execution_model: Structured slippage, commission, market impact, fill model with presets
expected_components.robustness_test: Monte Carlo perturbation (price noise, slippage noise, timing jitter, cost perturbation)

fgip/backtest/portfolio_backtest.py.note: Slippage exists as a config field, not as a model

fgip/data/price_manager.py.note: SQLite caching with fetched_at timestamps. Enables offline replay but NO dataset fingerprinting.
fgip/data/price_manager.py.status: PARTIAL — caching exists, hashing does not

receipts/paper_trade/SUMMARY.json.note: Hash fields exist in receipt but unclear what they hash and whether they're deterministic

receipts_found.note: No execution model receipt. No robustness test receipt. No dataset snapshot receipt.

missing: No DataSnapshot class
No ExecutionModel class (no presets: optimistic/baseline/conservative)
No RobustnessTest class
No Monte Carlo perturbation testing
No market impact modeling (order size effects)
No fill price model
No fragility flags
No dataset fingerprinting beyond receipt hashes
Slippage is flat bps, not volume/volatility-dependent
Commission is hardcoded zero
WO-N.verdict: Almost nothing from WO-N description exists. Fixed slippage_bps and receipt hashes are the only traces. 10% of WO-N scope. SPEC, not implemented.

justification: ConvictionEngine imports and has 1256 lines of real logic
PortfolioBacktest runs and produces receipted results
8 thesis backtests with SHA256 hashes exist (2026-03-03)

recommended_forward_path.step_1: Complete WO-K: Wire position_sizing into backtest loop, verify trailing_stop, add backtest test suite
recommended_forward_path.step_2: Build WO-L: BacktestAuditor class (out-of-sample check, statistical significance, data validation)
recommended_forward_path.step_4: Build WO-N: DataSnapshot, ExecutionModel (with presets), RobustnessTest (Monte Carlo)
